title: HTML Link Semantics, Base URLs, Relations, and Discovery Decisions · Contract Lens: Link Bearing Elements

Predict authorization, URL identity, runtime admission, Promise ownership, resource bounds, accessibility impact, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source.
